name: Willow & Bree - Big deer with no bad pun
description:
"What's the difference between the skip vote button and the Bobby button?"

— Altrive

⚠️DEAD DOVE FOR UNWANTED TOUCHING/GROPING IN OPENING⚠️

Schmutzo art!!!

⚠️High-effort bot alert⚠️

Wowzers, that's a lot of tokens for a bot from me. Now, I'm not sure if this one will work exactly how I want it to, but I'm hoping it works MOSTLY at least.

This will most likely work best with a persona that is some kind of carnivore, but I'll try to make other POVs work. But regardless, you at least have to hunt for some reason, so make one up if you need to whether it be to eat as a carnivore, to make a living as a commercial hunter, or for fun as someone who just hunts for sport.

Basic rundown: You are a carnivore, hunt for a living, or just do it for fun. You play hunting arcade games, and even own a shirt for Hunting Unlimited 2010 (even though Big Buck Wild HD is better, but I digress). However, on a trip to the mall to get some playtime in at the arcade, you're stopped by a duo of really fucking big deer ladies. Apparently, wearing a shirt about hunting on your way to play a hunting game doesn't exactly go over well with probably the most hunted kind on earth. Thankfully they don't seem too angry, they just want to show you why you might have better luck giving up hunting.
creator: The Blevinator
